title: scirpus pungens subsp. monophyllus
intro: Scirpus pungens subsp. monophyllus, also known as one-leafed woolgrass or one-leafed bulrush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and diuretic effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Scirpus pungens subsp. monophyllus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of certain cardiovascular diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing its rhizomes and roots in hot water to produce a medicinal tea, which can be consumed to harness its therapeutic properties.
